methodsAttempted.query: Peking University AI academic integrity generative AI policy
methodsAttempted.notes: DuckDuckGo returned no English results for PKU AI policy.
Searched dean.pku.edu.cn, scielab.pku.edu.cn subdomains. No centralized university-wide AI policy page found on pku.edu.cn.
Found AI科研诚信平台 with comprehensive research AI use guidelines.

summary: PKU discovery found 1 verified source (AI科研诚信平台 research guidance) and 2 rejected sources. No dedicated university-wide AI education policy found comparable to Tsinghua. PKU appears to rely on national-level guidelines (MOST, CAS) aggregated on their scielab platform.
